description: Generic searchable dropdown with client-side or server-side data loading, keyboard navigation, custom item templates, and a clear button. Supports two-way binding via Value/ValueChanged.

parameters.name: DataProvider
parameters.description: Server-side data provider. When set, Items is ignored.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Fires when the selected item changes.

parameters.name: IdField
parameters.description: Field selector for item key (used for @key).

parameters.name: Placeholder
parameters.description: Placeholder text when no item is selected. When null, falls back to the localized default.

parameters.name: FilterPlaceholder
parameters.description: Placeholder for the filter input. When null, falls back to the localized default.

parameters.name: EmptyMessage
parameters.description: Message when no items match the filter. When null, falls back to the localized default.

parameters.name: LoadingMessage
parameters.description: Message shown while loading from DataProvider. When null, falls back to the localized default.

parameters.name: ErrorMessage
parameters.description: Message shown when DataProvider throws. When null, falls back to the localized default.

parameters.name: ShowClearButton
parameters.description: Shows a clear button when a value is selected.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS class for the root element.

examples.title: Client-side filterable dropdown
examples.code:
<TmFilterableDropdown TItem="string" TValue="string"
    Items="@countries"
    @bind-Value="selectedCountry"
    Placeholder="Select country"
    ShowClearButton="true" />

examples.title: Server-side data provider with custom template
examples.code: @context.FullName (@context.Email)
